title: Health Economics & Outcomes Research
description: The HEOR module provides specialized tools for health economics and outcomes research, including claims data exploration, cost and utilization analysis, and visualization of contract and value-based care performance metrics. It supports researchers and payers in quantifying the economic impact of clinical interventions.
tips: Use the Claims Explorer to drill into utilization patterns and identify high-cost patient segments within your study population.
Align cost analysis time windows with clinically meaningful episodes of care to ensure economic findings are interpretable.
Leverage contract visualization tools to compare actual versus target performance on value-based care arrangements.
Combine HEOR outputs with clinical outcomes data to build comprehensive cost-effectiveness arguments for interventions.
Validate claims data completeness using the Data Quality Dashboard before drawing conclusions about utilization trends.
